zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Pateshulle於1165年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾時，他的父親Ernulf De Pateshull19歲，母親Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull16歲。他於1193年與Amice在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1216年3月30日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特享年51歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾派維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Pateshulle于1165年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾时，他的父亲Ernulf De Pateshull19岁，母亲Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull16岁。他于1193年与Amice在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1216年3月30日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特享年51岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾派維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Pateshulle was born in 1165, in Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Ernulf De Pateshull, was 19 and his mother, Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull, was 16. He married Amice in 1193, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 30 March 1216, in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Pipewell, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Pateshulle est né en 1165, à Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Ernulf De Pateshull, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Amice en 1193, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 30 mars 1216, à Towcester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Pipewell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Pateshulle 1165 in Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ernulf De Pateshull 19 und seine Mutter Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull 16. Er hat 1193 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Amice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 30. März 1216 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Pipewell, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Pateshulle è nato il nel 1165 nel Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Ernulf De Pateshull, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Amice nel 1193, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 30 marzo 1216, nel Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Pipewell, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Pateshulleが1165年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプアッティシャルで生まれた時，父Ernulf De Pateshullは19歳，母Mrs Ernulf De Pateshullは16歳であった。1193年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでAmiceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1216年3月30日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウセスターで51歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアピペウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Pateshulle(이)가 1165년 영국 노르섬프토실르 패티샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ernulf De Pateshull(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1193년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Amice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1216년 3월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 파이p웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Pateshulle nasceu em 1165, em Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ernulf De Pateshull, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Amice em 1193, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 30 de março de 1216, em Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Pipewell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Pateshulle родился в 1165 г. в местности паттишолл, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ernulf De Pateshull было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Amice в 1193 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 30 марта 1216 г. в местности тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности паипюелл, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Pateshulle nació en 1165, en Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ernulf De Pateshull, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mrs Ernulf De Pateshull, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Amice en 1193, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1216, en Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Pipewell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
